source_pr.title: planner: strengthen the cases the join reorder can apply
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #34590 and close #34591 

Problem Summary:

We need to take the filters of the outer join separately from the inner join's.
This pr strengthen it first, then relax it in the future prs.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("SELECT t2.a,t2.b,t3.a,t3.b,t4.a,t4.b from (t3, t4) left join (t1, t2) on t3.a=1 AND t3.b=t2.b AND t2.b=t4.b order by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5;").Check( (executor/join_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("SELECT t2.a,t2.b,t3.a,t3.b,t4.a,t4.b from (t3, t4) left join (t1, t2) on t3.a=1 AND t3.b=t2.b AND t2.b=t4.b order by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5;").Check( (executor/join_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("SELECT t2.a,t2.b,t3.a,t3.b,t4.a,t4.b from (t3, t4) left join (t1, t2) on t3.a=1 AND t3.b=t2.b AND t2.b=t4.b order by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5;").Check( (executor/join_test.go)
